name: quioteframework/auth-jwt
description: Bearer/JWT resource-server authentication (JWS verification, JWKS, RFC 9068 client-type resolution) for Quiote, built on firebase/php-jwt.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/auth-jwt/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
